news.title:
Elecon Engineering's Q4 FY26 PAT fell 26.4% to Rs 108 crore on 6.5% lower revenue of Rs 746 crore YoY.
Order book rose to Rs 1,292 crore; MHE revenue grew 36.8% while Gear Division faced challenges with declining revenue.
news.summary:
Elecon Engineering's Q4 FY26 PAT fell 26.4% to Rs 108 crore on 6.5% lower revenue of Rs 746 crore YoY.
Order book rose to Rs 1,292 crore; MHE revenue grew 36.8% while Gear Division faced challenges with declining revenue.

news.title:
Elecon CMD sees strong order book for next year despite risks.
Early overseas recovery expected amid ongoing geopolitical risks.
news.summary:
Elecon CMD sees strong order book for next year despite risks.
Early overseas recovery expected amid ongoing geopolitical risks.

news.title:
Elecon Engineering reports audited financial results for FY ended Mar'26, approves Rs. 1.50 final dividend/share.
Key appointments include CFO Chintan Shah, Chairman Prayasvin Patel, and independent director Dr. Savan Godiawala.
news.summary:
Elecon Engineering reports audited financial results for FY ended Mar'26, approves Rs. 1.50 final dividend/share.
Key appointments include CFO Chintan Shah, Chairman Prayasvin Patel, and independent director Dr. Savan Godiawala.

news.title: Elecon Engineering Q4 revenue drops to ₹7.5B from ₹7.98B YoY.
news.summary: Elecon Engineering Q4 revenue drops to ₹7.5B from ₹7.98B YoY.

news.title:
Elecon Engineering Q4 profit before exceptional item at 1.42B vs 1.9B YoY.
Company recorded exceptional item of 1B in the quarter.
news.summary:
Elecon Engineering Q4 profit before exceptional item at 1.42B vs 1.9B YoY.
Company recorded exceptional item of 1B in the quarter.

news.title: Elecon Engineering reported Q4 sales of INR 7,456.1M, down from INR 7,975.7M YoY.
news.summary: Elecon Engineering reported Q4 sales of INR 7,456.1M, down from INR 7,975.7M YoY.

news.title:
Elecon Engineering appoints Chintan Shah as CFO.
Prayaskvin Patel reappointed as chairman MD for 3 years.
news.summary:
Elecon Engineering appoints Chintan Shah as CFO.
Prayaskvin Patel reappointed as chairman MD for 3 years.

news.title:
Elecon Engineering will host an earnings call on April 16, 2026, at 4 PM IST.
The call, organized by Emkay Global, will discuss Q4FY26 and FY26 financial results.
news.summary:
Elecon Engineering will host an earnings call on April 16, 2026, at 4 PM IST.

news.title:
Elecon Engineering's subsidiary, Elecon Singapore, establishes Grupo Radicon SA de CV in Mexico.
Grupo Radicon focuses on sales, marketing, and servicing of industrial engineering products in Mexico and Latin America.
news.summary:
Elecon Engineering's subsidiary, Elecon Singapore, establishes Grupo Radicon SA de CV in Mexico.
Grupo Radicon focuses on sales, marketing, and servicing of industrial engineering products in Mexico and Latin America.

news.title:
Elecon Engineering surged 7.3% intraday, hitting Rs 407.5 peak on 18 Mar 2026.
The stock outperformed its sector and market, showing strong momentum.
news.summary:

news.title:
Elecon Engineering announces participation in a Non-Deal Roadshow in Mumbai on Jan 27-28, 2026.
Discussions will use public data; no price-sensitive information or presentations will be shared.

news.title:
Elecon Engineering's Q3 FY26 revenue grew 4.3% YoY to INR552 crores, but EBITDA margins fell to 19.8% due to flat revenue and higher costs.
Gear division contributed 78% revenue with INR429 crores, while MHE division saw 16% growth driven by demand from power, cement, and mining sectors.
news.summary:
Elecon Engineering's Q3 FY26 revenue grew 4.3% YoY to INR552 crores, but EBITDA margins fell to 19.8% due to flat revenue and higher costs.
Gear division contributed 78% revenue with INR429 crores, while MHE division saw 16% growth driven by demand from power, cement, and mining sectors.

news.title:
GIFT Nifty indicates a positive opening at 26,000, rising 0.12%.
Bajaj Finserv, BHEL, HUL, NHPC, Voltas, Elecon Engineering shares in focus.

news.title:
Elecon Engineering Q3 net profit fell to ₹720M from ₹1.1B YoY.
Revenue rose to ₹5.5B in Q3, up from ₹5.3B YoY.
news.summary:

news.title:
Elecon Engineering's market cap dropped ₹4.9b, impacting private companies owning 55% of shares, the largest shareholder group.
Top 2 shareholders hold over 55% of shares, with insiders owning 7.1b worth of shares, showing strong alignment with the company.
news.summary:
Elecon Engineering's market cap dropped ₹4.9b, impacting private companies owning 55% of shares, the largest shareholder group.
Top 2 shareholders hold over 55% of shares, with insiders owning 7.1b worth of shares, showing strong alignment with the company.

news.title:
Ace investors Ashish Kacholia, Vijay Kedia, Mukul Agrawal, and Ajay Upadhyaya hold stakes in Vasa Denticity, Vikran Engineering, Yatharth Hospital, and Elecon Engineering.
Elecon Engineering trades at Rs. 481/share with a market cap of Rs. 10,793.6 crore; Vijay Kedia holds 1% stake valued at Rs. 108.1 crore.
news.summary:
Ace investors Ashish Kacholia, Vijay Kedia, Mukul Agrawal, and Ajay Upadhyaya hold stakes in Vasa Denticity, Vikran Engineering, Yatharth Hospital, and Elecon Engineering.
Elecon Engineering trades at Rs. 481/share with a market cap of Rs. 10,793.6 crore; Vijay Kedia holds 1% stake valued at Rs. 108.1 crore.

news.title:
Elecon Engineering's stock fell on 8 Dec due to disappointing quarterly results.
The decline reflects subdued investor participation and underperformance against market indices.
news.summary:
